# Code of Conduct

## Our Commitment
As the maintainer of **@metamatopoeia/liquid-glass-ui**, I am committed to providing a respectful, professional, and harassment-free experience for everyone who interacts with this project—whether through bug reports, feature requests, or general inquiries.

## Expected Behavior
To ensure a productive environment, I ask that all participants:
* **Be Respectful:** Treat others with courtesy. Harassment, personal attacks, or exclusionary language will not be tolerated.
* **Be Constructive:** Provide clear, actionable feedback when reporting issues.
* **Respect Boundaries:** This project is currently in a "Support-Only" phase. Please respect the decision not to accept Pull Requests at this time.

## Enforcement
I reserve the right to moderate, hide, or delete comments and close issues that violate these standards. Users who engage in persistent or severe harassment will be blocked from the repository.

## Reporting
If you witness or experience inappropriate behavior, please contact me privately at **metamatopoeia@gmail.com**.
